pi_items.source: Parsed via GS1 Application Identifier (AI) 01 from raw GS1 string
Parsed via GS1 Application Identifier (AI) 17 from raw GS1 string
Parsed via GS1 Application Identifier (AI) 10 from raw GS1 string
Derived by concatenation of GS1 application identifiers: 01 + GTIN + 17 + EXP + 10 + LOT

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for bcwebcam_env verify_pharmacy_dscsa_datamatrix task. The target GS1 string (01003000106332151726053110BXL99) is synthetically generated and successfully parses to GTIN (00300010633215), EXP (260531), and LOT (BXL99), matching the metadata claims despite the GTIN check digit being mathematically invalid according to the GS1 algorithm. Discovered a critical defect: both setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1 are entirely missing from the environment, making the task completely unexecutable and programmatically unscorable because task_result.json is never generated.
